title: Sales Promoter
description:
A Sales Promoter is responsible for actively promoting products, engaging with potential customers, and boosting sales through direct interactions. Their job scope includes:

1. Product Promotion & Demonstration

  • Approach customers and introduce products
  • Demonstrate product features and benefits
  • Provide samples or trial experiences (if applicable)

2. Sales & Customer Engagement

  • Persuade customers to make purchases
  • Answer product-related questions and address concerns
  • Upsell and cross-sell related products

3. Store/Booth Setup & Maintenance

  • Set up promotional booths or product displays
  • Ensure promotional materials (banners, brochures) are well-arranged
  • Keep the display area clean and presentable

4. Sales Tracking & Reporting

  • Keep records of daily sales and customer feedback
  • Report sales performance and challenges to the supervisor
  • Provide insights on customer preferences and market trends

5. Collaboration & Training

  • Work with sales teams and store staff to achieve sales targets
  • Attend product training sessions to stay updated on new features
  • Follow company sales strategies and guidelines

postedCompany.description:
We build FT Group on a foundation in developing people. We believe that everyone should be given an opportunity to learn and then be put at his or her strengths.

Throughout your career with us, you’ll be given the opportunity to gain expertise by taking on new responsibilities as your career progresses. You can expect to be faced with a wide range of challenges that will hone your skills and develop your expertise.

We structure the learning path and will determine, with you, on the area where you are at your best – for maximum results.

Our team is friendly, inspired, motivated, knowledgeable, experienced and well versed at what they do. And we believe that the largest room in the world is the room for improvement.

Lets work together.

Give us a chance to walk alongside you, towards greatness together, each and every step of the way.

 

Our training and development process

At FT Group, we go beyond connecting theory to practice. We connect theory to your practice so you can achieve real results. Our organisation focuses on people management and leadership.

Our trainings and development are carefully designed to meet your career needs.

 

You won’t just read and talk about effective leadership. You will actually deploy them. We translate cutting-edge knowledge for real-world skills through action-based learning. Our trainings and development does not end in the classroom. Every person who emerges from the training is equipped with the tools to:

1.    Manage complexity decisions

2.    Lead effectively

3.    Implement change and drive results

4.    People Development

  • Individual Coaching
  • Onboarding Coaching
  • Team Coaching

5.    Performance Management

  • On-site observation 
  • Next stage training / re-training depending on review

6.    Achieve their personal and career goals
